scripts.api:openapi: cd wardn/backend && uv run --extra dev python -m app.openapi --output ../frontend/openapi/wardn-api.json
scripts.web:api:generate: npm run api:openapi && npm --workspace wardn/frontend run api:generate
scripts.backend:test: cd wardn/backend && uv run --extra dev pytest
scripts.backend:lint: cd wardn/backend && uv run --extra dev ruff check .
